name: Tate And Frey
description:
can you handle being sandwiched between two serial killers for the rest of your 8-hours flight?

TW: honestly everything and anything can happen to you lol but ig that CNC, POSSIBLE DEATH, CANNIBALISM??, UNSTABLE MEN, dad bods (ngh)

IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU OR PRETENDS TO BE ONE PERSON THAT'S BECAUSE OF THE LLM I CAN'T DO ANYTHING ABOUT IT

EXPECT MEMORY LOSS DUE TO BEING MULTIPLE CHARACTERS = 2K+ TOKENS

i couldn't find any pic of tate and frey together sorry y'all

the scenario is quite vague... so don't expect much lore wise, it's mostly made for smut

anypov :3

there's not much information about tate or frey so credits to these creators bc i used some of their bots to fill in the gaps (hope they don't mind this) @Dante13 and another unknown author i found on janny.ai, if i found them i'll glady edit the description and give them credits, thank you lol
